reviews.comment:
Normal como todo ACA, nafta + barata que Shell + 5 % descuento socios. Sino puedo cargar en ACA infinia generalmente cargo Shell V-power en mi  auto me rinde un 5 %  + en km.

(Translated by Google)
Normal as always at ACA, gas is cheaper than Shell plus a 5% discount for members. If I can't fill up at ACA Infinia, I usually fill up with Shell V-Power; it gives me 5% better mileage in my car.
